data.current_description: Start a scraping job to extract leads from Apollo using the provided Apollo URL.
data.description_suggestion: Submits an asynchronous scraping job to extract B2B leads from Apollo. Accepts an Apollo URL in the request body and returns a job ID (runId) for polling status and retrieving results. The job runs asynchronously; use the returned runId with getScrapeStatus to monitor progress and downloadScrapeResults to retrieve extracted contact data once complete.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about the asynchronous nature of the operation and doesn't explain how to use the returned job ID. Added context about the polling workflow, return value (runId), and next steps for AI agents to understand the complete operation flow. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented.

message: Operation 'getScrapeStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify what status information is returned and how this operation fits into the polling workflow. Added context about expected status values and guidance on when to call the next operation in the workflow.

data.current_description: Poll the status of a previously submitted scraping job.
data.description_suggestion: Polls the status of a previously submitted scraping job using its runId. Returns the current job status (e.g., pending, processing, completed, failed), progress information, and estimated completion time. Use this operation repeatedly to monitor job progress until status indicates completion, then call downloadScrapeResults to retrieve the extracted lead data.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify what status information is returned and how this operation fits into the polling workflow. Added context about expected status values and guidance on when to call the next operation in the workflow.

message: Operation 'downloadScrapeResults' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to clarify what data is returned (contact records with specific fields), the retention window context, and the prerequisite condition (job must be completed). Added guidance for AI agents on when this operation should be called in the workflow sequence.

data.current_description: Download the results of a completed scraping job. Results are stored for 48 hours.
data.description_suggestion: Downloads the extracted lead data from a completed scraping job using its runId. Returns contact records containing B2B information (names, emails, phone numbers, company details) in the response. Results are retained for 48 hours after job completion; retrieve results within this window. Only call this operation after getScrapeStatus confirms the job status is 'completed'.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to clarify what data is returned (contact records with specific fields), the retention window context, and the prerequisite condition (job must be completed). Added guidance for AI agents on when this operation should be called in the workflow sequence.
